query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `royalty_projects` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`projectType` enum('single','album','ep','compilation','soundtrack','podcast','commercial','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'single',
	`releaseDate` timestamp,
	`isrcCode` varchar(20),
	`upcCode` varchar(20),
	`totalRevenue` decimal(12,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
	`currency` varchar(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
	`status` enum('draft','active','completed','archived') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
	`createdBy` int NOT NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	`updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
	CONSTRAINT `royalty_projects_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
